We revisit the extraordinary 1998/99 UEFA Champions League final between Manchester United and Bayern Munich at the Nou Camp. Victory for United would clinch an historic Treble.
Category: Football;

A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, starred for Madrid.
Category: Football;

We revisit the dramatic 2000/01 UEFA Champions League final between Bayern Munich and Valencia at the San Siro in Milan. Bayern were chasing their first title in a quarter-century.
Category: Football;

The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.
Category: Football;

We revisit the 2002/03 UEFA Champions League final between Juventus and AC Milan at Old Trafford. Paolo Maldini aimed to lift the trophy as captain, just as his father did in 1963.
Category: Football;

A look back at the 2004 final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Porto were led by Jose Mourinho, who would leave the club to take over at Chelsea two days after the final.
Category: Football;
